About: It is about an anarchist organizational theory that aims to create a tightly coordinated anarchist federation.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Russian anarchist movement.
It is associated with the Makhnovshchina.
It is associated with the Nabat Confederation of Anarchist Organizations.
It is associated with the Delo Truda group.
It is associated with the Friends of Durruti Group.
It is associated with the Federation of Anarchist Communists of Bulgaria.
It is associated with the Libertarian Communist Federation.
It is associated with the Revolutionary Anarchist Organization.
It is associated with the Anarchist Federation in Britain.
It is associated with the Federation of Anarchist Communists in Italy.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Peter Arshinov.
DevelopedIn: It was developed in exile after the Revolution.
HasA: It has a common tactical line.
It has a unified political policy.
It has a commitment to collective responsibility.
It has an executive committee tasked with carrying out collective action and political policy.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a common tactical line.
It is characterized by a unified political policy.
It is characterized by a commitment to collective responsibility.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the organizational principles of Mikhail Bakunin.
It was influenced by the Draft Declaration of the Revolutionary Insurgent Army of Ukraine.
It was influenced by the Declaration of the Makhnovists.
It was influenced by the Nabat Confederation of Anarchist Organizations.
It was influenced by the ideas of Platformism.
IsA: It is an anarchist organizational theory.
It is a minority tendency within the wider anarchist movement.
PublishedAs: It was published as the Organizational Platform of the General Union of Anarchists (Draft).
PublishedBy: It was published by Delo Truda.
UsedFor: It is used for creating a tightly coordinated anarchist federation.
It is used for agitating, educating and organizing the working classes.
It is used for transforming existing mass organizations into vehicles for a social revolution.
It is used for the creation of workers' councils.
It is used for encouraging and agitating workers to rebel against the state and capitalism.
It is used for agitating against any attempted reconstitution of the state by political parties.
It is used for educating the working class.
It is used for raising class consciousness.
It is used for carrying out collective action and political policy.
It is used for marshalling anarchist forces.
UsedIn: It is used in the Russian anarchist movement.
It is used in the international anarchist movement.
It is used in the Spanish Revolution.
It is used in the May 1968 movement.
UsedTo: It is used to create a tightly coordinated anarchist federation.
It is used to agitate, educate and organize the working classes.
It is used to transform existing mass organizations into vehicles for a social revolution.
It is used to serve as institutions of self-management in a stateless society.
It is used to encourage and agitate workers to rebel against the state and capitalism.
It is used to agitate against any attempted reconstitution of the state by political parties.
It is used to educate the working class.
It is used to raise class consciousness.
It is used to carry out collective action and political policy.
It is used to marshal the forces of the international anarchist movement.
